name: Execution
satire: Clean APM, ships clean code, no fat-fingered globals.

name: Awareness
satire: Reads the room, catches the bug before prod, never stands in the bad.
effect: Reduces damage taken, with a little extra output.

name: Composure
satire: Calm during the incident — no grey parses when the raid is on fire.
effect: Clutch output and survival while the party is in danger, and steadier (less swingy) results overall.
